allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\user\\" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'ccs|ccswitch|claude' } | Select-Object Name, Mode)

Bash(echo "===.claude/config.json==="; cat /c/Users/user/.claude/config.json; echo ""; echo "===settings.local.json==="; cat /c/Users/user/.claude/settings.local.json; echo ""; echo "=== ~/.claude.json \(search enabledPlugins\) ==="; grep -o '"enabledPlugins":[^}]*}' /c/Users/user/.claude.json 2>&1 | head -5; echo "exists?"; ls -la /c/Users/user/.claude.json 2>&1)
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([p['name'] for p in d['plugins']]\)")
